import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
mut i = 0
while i < lines.len()
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut j = 0
    mut found = -1
    while j < n
      if found == -1
        match string.byte_at(line, j)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 61
            found = j
          end
        when None
          j = j
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if found >= 0
      let key = string.substring(line, 0, found)
      let value = string.substring(line, found + 1, n)
      if string.len(key) > 0
        println("#{key}:#{value}")
      end
    end
  when None
    i = i
  end
  i = i + 1
end
